sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79169" key="pa/rdw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρδω</orth>, <sense id="n79169.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πέρδομαι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρέασι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάρειμι</ref> </xr> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰμί</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sum</tr_>).</sense> </entryFree>
